title: EXAMPLE 2.13  A BIBO-Stable but Asymptotically Unstable System
summary: This page explains the relationship between characteristic-root locations and system stability, emphasizing that asymptotic stability implies BIBO stability, but the converse need not hold. It introduces Example 2.13, where two cascade subsystems are given to illustrate a system that is BIBO-stable yet asymptotically unstable.
